dsl_rule.translation_notes: Approximated 5-day directional bias minimum using ADX_14 > 25 (trend strength confirmation). Mapped 8-10% price move to returns >= 0.08 for longs and <= -0.08 for shorts. Trend reversal condition simplified to consecutive directional failures using prev_high/prev_low crosses. Macro thesis support cannot be encoded structurally; assume pre-filtered by regime selection. Context-dependent direction handled by providing both entry_long and entry_short conditions.

backtest_rule.reason: Approximated 5-day directional bias minimum using ADX_14 > 25 (trend strength confirmation). Mapped 8-10% price move to returns >= 0.08 for longs and <= -0.08 for shorts. Trend reversal condition simplified to consecutive directional failures using prev_high/prev_low crosses. Macro thesis support cannot be encoded structurally; assume pre-filtered by regime selection. Context-dependent direction handled by providing both entry_long and entry_short conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should maintain positions in markets exhibiting major directional trends and avoid exiting prematurely when early price moves (10% of eventual advance) occur, as trends often extend far beyond initial expectations.
